creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
Sorry for this second PR, I believe that the server of e-mail
freebsd.org was in trouble yesterday.
I sent the first PR and how after 40 minutes had not received any sign
of opening of PR, I sent another.
Because of the delay of a PR to the other, ask that it be closed the
ports/138255.

Thank you and again, sorry.
